author: smimz
content: Hey <@372731338031366165> <@172932172657721344> <@194432762315407360> , apologies could not join the call yesterday to discuss the RPC error codes, I listened to the recording & happy to jump on a separate call to make progress or we could start a thread here, please let me know

author: smimz
content: The non standard errors are the ones defined in the [eip-1474](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-1474.md), but i do think we could define these codes properly in its own category
